productDisplayName: SDL by Sweet Dreams Women Pink Night suits
description: Style Note Perfect to slip into on a lazy day, to wear at a girly pyjama party or just for after-hours at home, these pyjama sets from SDL Loungewear instantly transport you to a world of calm. Crafted from soft cotton in pretty and feminine styles, they offer exemplary comfort and a flattering Fit.Product DetailsPink in colour with printed design, round neck, short sleeves with press button cuffs, available pyjama shorts in pink with printed design and adjustable drawcord,  also pink pyjama with elasticated waist with draw cord and two pockets on either sideMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warmDo not bleach, dry clean or iron on decoration or printTumble dry, normal, low heatIron low and dry in shadeSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing size M
